tasks.title: Add AI usage row schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Add AiUsageByModelRowSchema, AiUsageByProviderRowSchema, AiUsageByFeatureModelRowSchema, AiUsageDailyRowSchema (next to AiUsageByFeatureRowSchema) plus inferred types. These are the single source of truth for API response validation and admin client types. Row shape: { <dimension fields>, calls, tokensIn, tokensOut, costMicroUsd }; daily adds day:'YYYY-MM-DD'. Unit tests for parse/reject.

tasks.title: Add formatMicroUsd helper
tasks.description: Add a shared formatMicroUsd(micro:number):string formatter (e.g. 90000 -> $0.09, 184000 -> $0.184). Check @repo/utils for an existing money formatter and reuse; otherwise add a local admin util. Unit tests for zero, small, and large values. Cost is stored as integer micro-USD (1e6 = $1); never format inline.

tasks.title: aggregateAiUsageByModel storage query
tasks.description: Add aggregateAiUsageByModel to packages/ai-core/src/storage/usage.queries.ts mirroring aggregateAiUsageByFeature: select count + sum(tokensIn/tokensOut/costEstimateMicroUsd), groupBy(aiUsage.model), order by cost desc, map to Number. Optional feature/provider filters + window via buildConditions. Unit test against seeded fixtures; empty -> [].

tasks.title: aggregateAiUsageByProvider storage query
tasks.description: Add aggregateAiUsageByProvider to usage.queries.ts: groupBy(aiUsage.provider), optional feature filter + window. Same map-to-Number pattern. Unit test.

tasks.title: aggregateAiUsageByFeatureModel storage query (the cross)
tasks.description: Add aggregateAiUsageByFeatureModel to usage.queries.ts: groupBy(aiUsage.feature, aiUsage.model) -> one row per (feature, model). Window filter. This is the query that powers per-feature model comparison. Unit test asserting one row per combination present.

tasks.title: aggregateAiUsageDaily storage query
tasks.description: Add aggregateAiUsageDaily to usage.queries.ts: groupBy(date_trunc('day', aiUsage.createdAt)) ordered ascending, return day as 'YYYY-MM-DD' (UTC). Optional feature/model/provider filters. Boundary unit tests (rows at month/window edges land in the correct UTC day).

tasks.title: Extend buildConditions for model/provider filters
tasks.description: Extend buildConditions (or add a sibling) in usage.queries.ts to optionally filter by model and provider in addition to existing since/until/userId/feature. Unit test the new predicates compose with AND.

tasks.title: Public reporting wrappers + daily zero-fill
tasks.description: Add getUsageByModel, getUsageByProvider, getUsageByFeatureModel, getDailyUsage to packages/ai-core/src/usage/reporting/usage-reporting.ts mirroring getUsageByFeature (resolve window via getUtcMonthRange when year+month given; validate output against the new schemas). getDailyUsage fills missing days in the window with zeros (continuous axis). Export from reporting/index.ts, usage/index.ts, and package root. Unit tests incl. zero-fill continuity.

tasks.title: GET /admin/ai/usage/by-model endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /by-model to apps/api/src/routes/ai/usage/index.ts via createAdminListRoute, reusing YearSchema/MonthSchema + since<=until refine, optional feature/provider params, page/pageSize, permission AI_SETTINGS_MANAGE. Calls getUsageByModel. Integration tests: 200 shape, 403 without permission, 422 invalid params, pagination, unknown-param rejection.

tasks.title: GET /admin/ai/usage/by-provider endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /by-provider (optional feature filter) following the same factory/guard/validation pattern as by-model. Integration tests (200/403/422/pagination).

tasks.title: GET /admin/ai/usage/by-feature-model endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /by-feature-model returning per-(feature,model) rows. Same pattern. Integration tests.

tasks.title: GET /admin/ai/usage/daily endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /daily (optional feature/model/provider filters) returning the zero-filled day series. Same pattern. Integration tests incl. window-edge days.

tasks.title: TanStack Query hooks + URL search-param filters
tasks.description: Add TanStack Query hooks (one per endpoint) keyed by resolved filters, and serialize filters (feature/model/provider/month/date-range) to TanStack Router search params for shareable views. Types come from @repo/schemas.

tasks.title: usage.tsx page scaffold + route guard + nav link
tasks.description: Create apps/admin/src/routes/_authed/ai/usage.tsx with a beforeLoad guard identical to ai/settings.tsx, the filter top-bar (month picker / date-range toggle, feature/provider/model selects, reset), and add a nav entry to the AI section of the admin sidebar.

tasks.title: Totals card + by-feature/by-model/by-provider tables
tasks.description: Render the totals card (calls/tokensIn/tokensOut/cost) and the three breakdown tables ordered by cost desc, using formatMicroUsd and locale thousands separators. By-model table includes derived cost per 1k tokens.

tasks.title: Feature x model table + grouped bar chart
tasks.description: Render the by-(feature,model) table and a recharts grouped bar chart (cost per feature, one segment per model) so models can be compared within a feature. Uses formatMicroUsd; chart labels present (color not the only signal).

tasks.title: Daily cost chart
tasks.description: Render a recharts line/area chart of daily total cost across the window (one point per UTC day, zero days continuous), reflecting the active feature filter.

tasks.title: i18n keys ai.usage.* (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add all dashboard copy under an ai.usage.* namespace in @repo/i18n for es/en/pt (labels, table headers, empty states, filter controls). i18n completeness test must pass.

tasks.title: Per-block empty/loading/error states
tasks.description: Give each query block its own skeleton, an explicit empty state (AC-1.5 copy), and an error state with retry. One failing block must not blank the whole page.

tasks.title: Reconciliation test (totals == /by-feature)
tasks.description: Add a test asserting the new aggregates' totals equal the existing /by-feature totals for the same window (same source table) within 0 micro-USD, to catch aggregation drift.

tasks.title: Admin page component tests
tasks.description: Component tests for usage.tsx: renders totals + tables from mocked query data, empty state (AC-1.5), filter change updates query keys, one-block error does not blank the page.

tasks.title: Accessibility pass
tasks.description: Ensure tables use semantic markup and charts have an accessible text alternative (the adjacent table is canonical). Verify keyboard focus order on filters.

tasks.title: Docs: admin usage surface note
tasks.description: Short admin doc / CLAUDE note describing the new AI usage dashboard, the endpoints, and that it only reads (does not change metering or ceilings).
